title: Hanoi、Hanoi — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Hanoi、Hanoiの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

HanoiはHanoiにある人口8,250,000の都市です。Vietnam’s thousand-year-old capital blends ancient pagodas and tree-lined boulevards with a thriving startup scene, offering a lower cost of living than Ho Chi Minh City.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
